combat.name: Attack
combat.description: Make one melee or ranged attack with a weapon you are holding.

combat.name: Dash
combat.description: You gain extra movement equal to your speed for this turn.

combat.name: Dodge
combat.description: Until your next turn, any attack roll against you has disadvantage if you can see the attacker, and you make Dexterity saving throws with advantage.

combat.name: Disengage
combat.description: Your movement does not provoke opportunity attacks for the rest of this turn.

combat.name: Help
combat.description: You give advantage to an ally's next ability check or attack roll against a target within 5 feet of you.

combat.name: Hide
combat.description: Make a Dexterity (Stealth) check to try to become hidden from enemies.

combat.name: Opportunity Attack
combat.description: When a creature you can see moves out of your reach, you can use your reaction to make one melee attack against it.

class.name: Second Wind
class.description: Regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your Fighter level. Once per short or long rest.

class.name: Cunning Action: Dash
class.description: You can Dash as a bonus action.

class.name: Cunning Action: Disengage
class.description: You can Disengage as a bonus action.

class.name: Cunning Action: Hide
class.description: You can Hide as a bonus action.

class.name: Sneak Attack
class.description: Once per turn, deal extra 1d6 damage when you hit with a finesse or ranged weapon and have advantage, or an ally is within 5 ft of the target.

exploration.name: Hide
exploration.description: Make a Dexterity (Stealth) check to try to become hidden from enemies.

exploration.name: Search
exploration.description: Make a Wisdom (Perception) or Intelligence (Investigation) check to find something hidden nearby.

exploration.name: Study
exploration.description: Make an Intelligence (Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion) check to recall or deduce information about something.

exploration.name: Utilize
exploration.description: Use a non-magical object or interact with something in the environment, such as opening a door or drinking a potion.

exploration.name: Influence
exploration.description: Make a Charisma (Deception, Intimidation, Performance, or Persuasion) check to alter a creature's attitude.

exploration.name: Cast Ritual Spell
exploration.description: Cast a spell with the Ritual tag. This takes 10 minutes longer than normal but does not expend a spell slot.
